compiler_assumption_enabled: Only after the retained callee-entry requires check succeeds, its exact Bool proposition may be used by a deterministic checker proof to discharge dominated implicit bounds checks; no fact exists before the success edge and no unchecked assume is permitted.
required_static_check: Parse exactly let_stmt* then one check_stmt; type/ownership-check in a parameter-plus-prior-clause-let scope; admit only own copy clause locals and non-trapping total pure operation-table ANF calls; reject user calls, moves, borrows, indexing, mutation, control flow, allocation, trapping ops, unstable dependencies, and unproved downstream discharge.
runtime_or_diagnostic_obligation: Execute the explicit check once at every callee entry in every build, including gated foreign entry; false traps with the normal report, true dominates the body; preserve traps in the exact effect row and report each eliminated downstream check with a proof reference.
unsafe_or_FFI_escape_hatch: None. A gated foreign entry must invoke the same prologue and cannot bypass or replace it with a foreign assertion.
metadata_or_IR_that_might_be_emitted: A retained entry branch to the trap path plus canonical proof references on discharged downstream index operations; never llvm.assume and never a trusted range attribute derived solely from source text.
consequence_if_violated: Treating the clause as trusted or bypassing entry enforcement can elide an out-of-bounds check and admit memory corruption, violating T1/T2/W3; eliding the explicit check also violates OP-5 and changes observable trap semantics.
related_findings_or_backlog_items: 12 retained base64 output writes after PROOF-1
